name: How to add your hotel to lodging-world.com
description: Learn how to easily add your hotel to Lodging-World.com and reach a wider audience. Follow our step-by-step guide today!
main_title: How to add your hotel to lodging-world.com
richtext:
What is Lodging-world.com and why is it important?

Lodging-world.com is a website where travelers can search and book accommodations worldwide. Listing a hotel on the site can increase its visibility and bookings, as well as provide useful tools for managing listings and optimizing guest experiences.

‍

Step-by-step guide to add your business to Lodging-world.com

‍

  1. Go to the eDreams website (https://www.lodging-world.com/) and click “List your property free” button.

‍

  1. Scroll down the page and fill out your property details. Such as, Property name, type, address and contact details.

‍

  1. Add your property room information and amenities provided. 

‍

  1. Provide your personal information (owner/manager) and create an account.

‍

  1. Once all information is provided, click the “List your property” button under the your account section.
  1. Lodging-world.com will send a verification email to your email address, verify it by clicking on it. 

‍

  1. Additionally, you can add a Lodging-world.com Member Badge to your website by using the embedded script provided. 

‍

  1. Once your property is verified, it will be listed on Lodging-world.com, and you can start receiving reservations from travelers all over the world.

‍

In summary, joining a network group on Lodging-world.com is a great way to connect with other customers who are looking for travel, accommodation and transport.
